sections.sectionTitle: Jordan pan a kila Suangtum Sawmlenihte

verses.text: A minam bupin Jordan a galkah khit uh ciangin Topa in Joshua kiangah
“Nam khat pan mi khat, mite lak panin mi sawmlenih teel in la
amaute thu pia-in, ‘Siampite' khe a din'na mun mahmah, Jordan gun laizang panin suangtum sawmlenih la un la, a galah pua-in tu nitakin na giahna uh munah koih un,’ ci in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Joshua in nam khat panin mi khat, ama sehsa mi sawmlenihte Israel mite lak panin a sam hi
Joshua in amaute kiangah, “ Topa na Pasian uh Thuciamna Singkuang mai Jordan laizangah pai un la, note in Israel minam phazah tawh kizui-in suangtum khat ciat la-in na liangko tung uhah pua un
Hong tung ding hunah na tate un, ‘Hih suangtumte bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?’ ci-in hong dot ciangin note' lakah lim khat hi ding hi

Tua ciangin amaute kiangah, ‘ Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang mai-ah Jordan tuite kikhentan a, Jordan a galkah laitakun Jordan tuite kikhentan hi,’ na ci ding uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin hih suangtumte pen Israel mite tungah a tawntungin phawkna hi ding hi,” a ci hi

Joshua' thupiak bangin Israel mite gamta uh a, Topa in Joshua a thupiak bangin Israel minam a phazah tawh kizui-in Jordan laizang panin suangtum sawmlenih a la uh hi. Amaute in a giahna uh munah tuate pua-in a koih uh hi
Tua ciangin Joshua in Thuciamna Singkuang a pua siampite' khe a din'nasa mun, Jordan laizangah zong suang sawmlenih mah a phut hi. Tuni dongin tua suangte tua mun mahah omlai hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Moses in Joshua a thupiak bangin mite tungah a gen dingin Topa in Joshua a thupiak khempeuh a vekpi-in a kiman khit matengin Jordan laizangah Thuciamna Singkuang a pua siampite a ding uh hi. Mite nawhsa-in galkah uh hi
Mite khempeuh a galkah khit uh ciangin Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang leh siampite, mite' mai-ah na ma pai uh hi
Moses in amaute a sawlsa bangin Israel mite mai-ah hiam tawi-in Reuben minamte, Gad minamte, leh Manasseh minam alangte na ma pai uh a
mi tul sawmli bang galdo dingin hiam tawi-in a baihsa-in Jerikho zanglei lam Topa' mai-ah a pai uh hi
Tua ni-in Israel-te khempeuh' muhna-ah Topa in Joshua liansak hi. Amaute in Moses lamdangsa-in a om uh mah bangin Joshua a nuntak sung tawntung lamdangsa-in a om uh hi
Tua ciangin Topa in Joshua kiangah
“Thuciamna Singkuang a pua siampite Jordan panin hong paikhiatna ding thu pia in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in siampite thu pia a, “Jordan panin hong paikhia un,” a ci hi

Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang a pua siampite Jordan laizang panin hong paikhia-in, siampite' khe lei keu tungah hong omtoh ciangin, a ngeina bangin amau' munah Jordan tuite hong luangkikin a piau khempeuh a tuum hi
Kha masa a ni sawm ni-in Jordan panin mite paikhia uh a, Jerikho nisuahna lam gamgi Gilgal-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Jordan panin a lakkhiat uh tua suangtum sawmlenihte Joshua in Gilgal-ah a phut hi
Tua ciangin amah in Israel mite kiangah, “Hong tung ding hunah na tate un, ‘Hih suangte bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?’ ci-in hong dot uh ciangin
‘Israel-te in lei keu tung tawnin hih Jordan kantan hi,’ ci-in na tate uh na theisak ding uh hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh eite in i kantan khit matengin Topa na Pasian un a kan'sak San Tuipi tungah a bawl bangin, note in na kantan khit matengun Topa na Pasian un Jordan tuite note-a' dingin kangsak hi
Topa vanglian mahmah hi, ci-in leitung mi khempeuh in a theihna ding leh Topa na Pasian uh na zahtak tawntung theihna ding uh ahi hi,” a ci hi.
